description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a narrow yard and bordered by hedges and trees. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the house features a small entry path leading to a recessed doorway, flanked by a manicured lawn and a tree. The backyard includes a private patio area, partially enclosed by fencing and landscaping for privacy. The roof is flat, consistent with contemporary architectural styles, and the windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a private patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry path, recessed doorway, front lawn, and a tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, white exterior wall, asymmetrical window placement, and the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private patio, backyard landscaping, and a tree at the far end of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible windows, fencing, and the driveway or side yard area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a short entry path, no porch, and minimalistic landscaping
